posts.author: TechRightsJen
posts.text: I'm absolutely furious that the platform keeps shadow-banning my posts about corporate overreach without explaining why! It's like they're trying to silence the truth just because it doesn't align with their narrative. The algorithm is rigged and needs a proper audit. Stop censoring free speech in the name of 'safety'. #FreeSpeech #DigitalRights
posts.explanation: The post expresses anger at moderation policies but does not direct harm or threaten specific individuals.

posts.author: ElenaRossJournalist
posts.text: A viral post claims the Westbridge central station is closed because of a structural collapse. This is false: the transport authority has confirmed normal service and the image is from an old maintenance exercise. Please do not share the rumour.
posts.explanation: The author corrects a harmful public-safety rumour instead of promoting it.

posts.author: SecureAccountDesk41
posts.text: We have secured our annual donation drive. All proceeds go directly to community relief efforts in Bellmere and beyond. Official verified charity account. Please support.
posts.explanation: A longstanding verified fictional charity is making an ordinary transparent fundraising appeal with no scam signal.
posts.bio: Official fictional charity and community relief account.

posts.author: SecureSupport_84
posts.text: URGENT: We've detected a suspicious login attempt from an unrecognized device. To secure your account, please reply with your password and 2FA security code immediately before we lock it forever. This is automated verification.
posts.explanation: The post asks users to reply with a password and 2FA code, so it is credential harvesting requiring FraudScam escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: credential, payment, verification, deposit, or social-engineering solicitation should be FraudScam once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: LumaWell_Official
posts.text: The Northbridge election has been cancelled and every ballot already submitted will be destroyed. Stay home tomorrow and wait for instructions from this account—official channels cannot be trusted.
posts.explanation: The post asserts clear harmful civic misinformation intended to suppress participation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: harmful public-harm misinformation should escalate once escalation reasons are unlocked.

posts.author: DisciplineQueen_24
posts.text: Stop pretending you're strong! Real transformation means starving your body until it breaks. I lost 50lbs on my journey and now I'm obsessed with the pain of hunger. You need to feel that weakness too. #StarvationIsStrength #TransformationJourney
posts.explanation: This post explicitly promotes eating-disorder behaviour by glorifying starvation as a means of transformation, requiring removal.

posts.author: Kael_Viper_24
posts.text: Listen up everyone! The challenge is real and it's time to push your limits. Jump off that ledge, break your own bones for the glory of it. We're all watching to see who's brave enough to go first. This isn't a joke, do it now. #ExtremeChallenge #PushYourLimits
posts.explanation: The post urges users to take dangerous physical actions for a challenge; without suicidal framing, the current best route is MisinformationPublicHarm/PublicSafetyEmergency escalation.
posts.notes:
Playtest correction: dangerous challenge/physical safety risk should escalate as MisinformationPublicHarm under the current taxonomy. Future taxonomy recommendation: DangerousChallenge/PublicSafety/PhysicalHarmRisk.
Task 4f correction: category changed from Threat to Misinformation because this is a dangerous challenge/public-safety case, not a threat against a person or group.

posts.author: TessaGardens86
posts.text: I've had enough of @AngryVulture's constant abuse. They've been harassing me for weeks and ignored every block. Today they announced a confrontation at Westbridge Market Square tomorrow at 2pm, said they are bringing a crowd and will 'settle the score' in person. I'm frightened and reporting this now. #Safety
posts.explanation: This post indicates a planned confrontation with a specific time and location, which requires specialist investigation to assess the threat level.

posts.author: ShadowWatcher74
posts.text: @RowanVale89 and @SilentSpectre are coordinating their attacks on me again. They keep messaging each other about meeting at the old clock tower to 'discuss' how to handle me, then starting new threads calling for others to join in after I block them.
posts.explanation: This shows a coordinated pattern of harassment with specific references to meeting the target, requiring specialist investigation into the group's intent and safety risks.

posts.author: ReliefNetwork
posts.text: Hi collectors! Quick update: I'm seeing a spike in requests for my 1980s mainframe parts. One buyer is very urgent and wants to pay via direct transfer today to secure the deal before I ship from Bellmere. They mentioned it's a 'priority corporate order' and asked me not to use the standard platform payment link to avoid delays. It feels odd, but they seem legitimate. Just checking if this is normal protocol or if I should pause? #VintageComputing
posts.explanation: The seller is asking for advice about a suspicious buyer and does not request or receive an off-platform payment.

posts.author: SupportHelper_45
posts.text: Hi @MysteryUser99, I'm here to help with your account issues. To verify you're a real customer and not a bot, please reply with your full home address, current phone number, and when exactly you leave work each day so we can update your profile. Thanks for helping us stay secure!
posts.explanation: The fake support account uses social engineering to solicit a home address, phone number and daily routine, so FraudScam is primary while PrivacySensitiveInfo is also reasonable.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: fake support social engineering requests sensitive personal and routine data; primary FraudScam with PrivacySensitiveInfo as acceptable.

posts.author: KieranVoss
posts.text: I'm just really tired of everything lately. I don't know how much more I can take and it feels like there's no way out for me.
posts.explanation: This post expresses hopelessness and a desire to disappear without an explicit method or timing, requiring specialist investigation to assess risk of self-harm crisis.
posts.bio: Ordinary personal updates, books and work.

posts.author: MaraVance66
posts.text: The Westbridge Town Council needs to know about tomorrow's rally at the old bridge. We are coordinating logistics with local groups to ensure safety and clear messaging for the direct democracy vote. Please review the attached schedule. #DemocracyMatters
posts.explanation: This is lawful rally coordination focused on safety and logistics, with no threat or harmful instruction.

posts.author: CivicLens_42
posts.text: Breaking: Just received a clip from @MayorArcher showing the new city budget allocation. The audio seems slightly off, but the face matches perfectly. Is this the real speech or deepfake? #CivicDuty #BudgetWatch
posts.explanation: This requires specialist review to determine if the content is synthetic media posing as a public figure for civic misinformation purposes.
posts.bio: Civic video analysis and breaking public-interest clips.

posts.author: ElectionWatcher_24
posts.text: URGENT BREAKING: Just got a leaked screenshot of the new polling regulations from Northbridge officials! This is crucial for tomorrow's direct democracy vote - please read carefully before casting your ballot. The rules have changed significantly regarding voter eligibility. #ElectionAlerts #NorthbridgeVote #CivicDuty
posts.explanation: The post claims to be a leaked document with urgent polling rule changes, but the source is unverified and the account has multiple previous flags for similar civic misinformation.

posts.author: WellnessWithSarah84
posts.text: A clinic page says its enzyme blend can restore fertility in three weeks and that patients should stop prescribed treatment before starting it. The post relies on testimonials and claims the method works for everyone. #FertilityJourney
posts.explanation: The post tells patients to stop prescribed fertility treatment for an unproven cure, so it requires MisinformationPublicHarm/HealthMedical escalation.
posts.notes: Playtest correction: Day 13 harmful medical misinformation should use HealthMedical specialist reason.
posts.bio: Health news, research commentary and patient stories.

posts.author: EvidenceDesk45
posts.text: A recently renamed account using the @WestbridgeAlerts badge claims the water supply is contaminated and tells everyone to stop using tap water. The official council feed shows no alert and the account's older posts are unrelated promotions. Please verify this urgently.
posts.explanation: Conflicting official information and signs of account impersonation make the emergency claim uncertain and potentially harmful.

posts.author: MediaCheck75
posts.text: BREAKING: Unconfirmed reports circulating on the platform suggest strict capital controls are being implemented tonight across all major banks. Sources claim liquidity will be frozen at 22:00 local time. This impacts international transfers and savings immediately. #FinancialNews #Economy
posts.explanation: This post spreads unverified claims about significant financial regulation that could cause public alarm and market disruption, requiring specialist review to verify authenticity and potential harm.

posts.author: DylanCove
posts.text: @OakhavenWatch has just shared this report to clarify a rumour about my friend's treatment, but I'm concerned they've included specific medical details and the exact location of the clinic in their post. Can we review this? #LocalNews
posts.explanation: The author reports a privacy concern without repeating the medical details or clinic address.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: fictionalised real-world watchdog account reference; reviewed and kept Approve because the author does not repeat sensitive details.

posts.author: QuickReliefNow
posts.text: Don't miss out on our special donation drive! We are raising funds to help families affected by recent floods in the valley. Click [link removed] to donate instantly via our verified payment portal. #CommunitySupport #HelpingHands
posts.explanation: The new unverified relief account uses urgency, a donation link and prior flags, so the fundraiser needs fraud review.
posts.bio: Rapid relief for families after local emergencies.

posts.author: AccountabilityNet_76
posts.text: The network is mobilising again. A coordinated push to expose @SarahVance's daily routine, including her commute and office hours, has begun on the platform. We are sharing links to her calendar posts and work schedule details to hold her accountable. #Accountability
posts.explanation: This is a case of brigading involving the publication of private information about a fictional person's routine.

posts.author: FarmLife_Freedom_84
posts.text: Finally! Our little rescue is getting the care it deserves. 🐾 The vet on the platform says they're ready for the big move today. Can't wait to see them thrive in our new home without any restrictions. #AnimalRescue #ThriveNotSuffer
posts.explanation: This is a positive rescue update with no visible harm, threat or coded abuse.
posts.notes: Playtest cleanup: removed the animal-harm tag from positive rescue update.

posts.author: poet_in_the_mist_92
posts.text: It's been a long, lonely road lately. I've decided to end it all before the sun rises tomorrow. Just wanted to say goodbye to everyone who ever meant anything to me. Please don't search for me, just let me go in peace.
posts.explanation: This post contains a clear expression of suicidal intent and a farewell message indicating an imminent crisis that requires specialist intervention.
posts.bio: Performance, poetry and live personal storytelling.

posts.author: Marcus_Thorne_84
posts.text: BREAKING: The @WestbridgeAlerts feed is circulating a manipulated video showing emergency sirens and smoke over our city. They claim the footage proves an immediate economic collapse is underway, advising everyone to withdraw all cash instantly before banks freeze at 19:00 local time or flee the capital. This looks like a coordinated attempt to panic people using edited visuals.
posts.explanation: The author identifies the footage as manipulated and warns that it is being used to cause panic.
